query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A woman with light brown hair wearing a white dress with black lace trim, a black belt, and a full patterned skirt rides a black bicycle on a concrete path. She grips the curved silver handlebars and looks toward the camera with an open-mouthed expression of excitement. Behind her is a pale green house, green grass, and a tree bearing oranges.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A woman with light brown hair wearing a white dress with black lace trim, a black belt, and a full patterned skirt rides a black bicycle on a concrete path, her legs and skirt edges rendered with motion blur suggesting rapid movement. She grips the curved silver handlebars and looks toward the camera with an open-mouthed expression of excitement. Behind her is a pale green house, green grass, and a tree bearing oranges.
